_note: PRIVACY-BY-DESIGN: aggregated to district (stadsdeel) level only -- no specific shelter names, buildings, or addresses. Routing recommendations point to a district-level meal-need pool; last-mile delivery to a specific shelter/kitchen is left to local partner logistics, which is also the safer real-world design (this app should never itself expose which building vulnerable people are in).

sources.homelessTotal: 2,695 people in shelter/temporary accommodation in Amsterdam, 2023 (CBS, Monitor Dakloosheid regional breakdown)
sources.districtShareCaveat: CBS publishes the 2,695 figure city-wide, not broken down per stadsdeel. The per-district counts below distribute that verified total using illustrative district population-share estimates (approximate, not an official per-district census breakdown). Replace with a real per-district figure from Gemeente Amsterdam / shelter-operator partners if this becomes a production system.

assumptions.assumedExistingCoveragePctNote: Planning assumption representing meal need already met by existing food aid/shelters before FoodBridge routing -- calibrate per district once partner intake data is available.
